<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\ViewNotFoundSolutionProvider as BaseViewNotFoundSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class ViewNotFoundSolutionProvider extends BaseViewNotFoundSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
